assessment.note: She pivoted from mentoring to lower motivation in team rituals, signaling strong growth disconnection and mild wellbeing drag; [THREAD-DEFERRED] team rituals motivation drop could be worth a later engagement probe.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: Where would you want more from me to move this forward?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific kind of manager support that would actually unblock her next step.

new_queue.label: Next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Open closer that lets her name the first area to act on before the next conversation.
